title: InboxResponse
description: Response envelope for the Testmail JSON API inbox query.

result.description: Indicates whether the API call succeeded.

message.description: Human-readable message. Null on success; populated with error detail on failure.

count.description: Total number of emails matching the query before pagination is applied.

limit.description: Maximum number of emails returned per request as specified in the request.

offset.description: Number of emails skipped for pagination as specified in the request.

emails.description: Array of email objects matching the query.
